creator: beldin@beldin.org
text:
Both the qemu-user-static ports are failing during build because swapoff(2) had an extra argument added to -CURRENT by patch 5346570276a5ddfd5f530201fcbf24ddcc53033d on Dec 8th. 

This patch fixes either of them for building under -CURRENT after this commit. I'm not sure how to make the patch conditional on FreeBSD version however.
